result.reason: The issue describes a common user need for migrating application settings and connections to a new computer, which can be addressed by implementing a clear export/import mechanism. This significantly improves user experience for setup and migration.
result.approach: Implement a comprehensive 'Export Settings' and 'Import Settings' feature. This feature will involve identifying all user-specific data files (connections, credentials, application settings), packaging them into a single, portable archive (e.g., ZIP) during export, and then extracting and correctly placing them during import. UI elements will be added to the main form to trigger these processes, with appropriate user prompts and security considerations for sensitive data.
